title: Japan routs Tunisia in World Cup and captures media attention
summary: The Japanese team defeated Tunisia 4-0, with a performance that generated analysis, high ratings, and international reactions.

title: Nikkei 225 surpasses 72,000 points for first time in history
summary: Japanese stocks reached a new all-time high driven by the technology sector and expectations of economic growth.

title: United States and Iran resume talks on Lebanon conflict
summary: Senior officials from both countries met to discuss a ceasefire in Lebanon, with progress reported by mediating countries.

title: Japan's prime minister faces accusations over defamatory video
summary: In the face of accusations linking him to defamation via a video, the government will announce the submission of an affidavit from his secretary.

title: Cape Verde, World Cup debutant, impresses with its performance
summary: The team from the small African island nation, the smallest in the tournament, earned two draws and captured global attention for its story of overcoming adversity.

title: Japan preserves war memory through testimonies and commemorative events
summary: Exhibitions, survivor stories, and social media posts keep alive the memory of World War II and the Battle of Okinawa.

title: Japan accelerates adoption of artificial intelligence in various fields
summary: From applications in zoos to police systems and data centers, AI is expanding in Japan, creating opportunities and controversies.

title: Japan orders inspection of fire safety systems in all schools
summary: After a fire at an elementary school, the Ministry of Education required equipment checks and nationwide drills.

title: 5-year-old child disappears at a hot spring resort on Kyushu island
summary: Authorities search for a child who was swept away by a river at a hot spring complex in Kagoshima.

title: Dodgers suffer heavy defeat with Shohei Ohtani in the lineup
summary: The Los Angeles team lost by a wide margin despite the Japanese star getting a hit, in a game covered by the Japanese press.

title: Alleged leader of transnational criminal organization arrested in Japan
summary: The arrest was made on suspicion of falsifying residency records, in an operation against organized crime.

title: Japanese government proposes temporary reduction of consumption tax
summary: The measure, which includes a 1 percent cut in the tax on food, will be debated in Parliament amid rising prices.

title: Spain wins World Cup debut with goal by Lamine Yamal
summary: The Spanish team won 1-0, while Egypt achieved its first historic victory in the tournament.

title: Trump criticizes Netanyahu for his stance on Iran and fuels tension
summary: The former US president expressed disagreement with Israel's Iran policy and warned of a possible military escalation.

title: Japan plans to digitize customs procedures to streamline tourism
summary: The measure aims to expedite tourist entry and handle the increase in imports, easing the burden on customs by 2030.

title: Interest rate hike in Japan impacts economy and markets
summary: The rate increase by the Bank of Japan raises deposit yields and affects financial markets.

title: Japan invests in telecommunications infrastructure with drones and new networks
summary: Companies like KDDI and Japan Airlines announce innovative projects to improve air and ground connectivity.

title: Japan deploys long-range missiles amid US-China tension
summary: The Asian country strengthens its defensive capabilities as China advances in key technological sectors, according to a report.

title: Manga 'Hunter x Hunter' and band 'Orange Range' return after long absence
summary: Weekly Shonen Jump magazine will publish a new chapter of the manga, while the band will return for the World Cup.

title: Japan faces cases of gold smuggling and fentanyl trafficking
summary: Authorities detected attempts to hide gold bars in human figures and connections to money laundering from fentanyl.
